hypothesis: Integrating a structured, persistent semantic and episodic memory module into the multi-agent framework that records past extraction mappings, templating heuristics, and correction histories will reduce incorrect numerical parameter assignments during literature-to-force-field extraction by at least 50% and lower downstream adsorption isotherm RMSE against benchmark experimental or high-level-reference data by at least 30% compared to the current prompt-and-tool-only system.
